nodes.name: CR
nodes.summary: CR表示 IUCN 极危等级，当前关联174种鸟类，如勺嘴鹬、加州神鹫、菲律宾鹰等174种鸟类。

nodes.name: 湿地
nodes.summary: 浅水、沼泽与植被斑块组成的高生产力生态系统。

nodes.name: 人类活动扰动
nodes.summary: 旅游、施工和高频活动影响繁殖或觅食。

nodes.name: 印度尼西亚
nodes.summary: 印度尼西亚是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联297种鸟类，包括细斑树鸭、白腹麻鸭、太平洋黑鴨等297种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 马来西亚
nodes.summary: 马来西亚是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联156种鸟类，包括马来冠眼斑雉、婆羅洲地杜鵑、Short-toed coucal等156种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 栖息地破坏
nodes.summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

nodes.name: 亚洲鳍趾䴘
nodes.summary: 亚洲鳍趾䴘（Masked finfoot，学名 Heliopais personatus），在图谱中标记为极危（CR）物种，主要分布于马来西亚、印度尼西亚，常见栖息地包括湿地，主要威胁包括栖息地破坏、人类活动扰动。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The masked finfoot can be found in a range of habitats across the eastern Indian subcontinent through to Malaysia and Indonesia in a variety of fresh to brackish wetlands, although due to habitat destruction it has disappeared from most of this range

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The masked finfoot can be found in a range of habitats across the eastern Indian subcontinent through to Malaysia and Indonesia in a variety of fresh to brackish wetlands, although due to habitat destruction it has disappeared from most of this range

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: The masked finfoot can be found in a range of habitats across the eastern Indian subcontinent through to Malaysia and Indonesia in a variety of fresh to brackish wetlands, although due to habitat destruction it has disappeared from most of this range

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: Major threats to the species are human disturbance and habitat loss in the low-lying forested wetlands that it inhabits. The bird is protected in Malaysia

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: Major threats to the species are human disturbance and habitat loss in the low-lying forested wetlands that it inhabits. The bird is protected in Malaysia
